generatedBy: rork-agent Expo build 21 — startup audit final: missing app/index.tsx initial route, metro.config.js resilience, hardcoded password removal, full startup trace checkpoints
matchDetail: Expo source is at c493811. Render live backend reports 0b37191f. GitHub token expired so new commits are not synced to GitHub/Render.

apk.buildMethod: expo prebuild + gradlew assembleRelease (local, Watchman disabled)
apk.embeddedStartupFix: missing app/index.tsx initial route created, metro.config.js try/catch resilience, hardcoded password removed from loginOwnerPasswordless + SupabaseAuthDiagnostic, full startup trace checkpoints (APP_NATIVE_STARTED through APP_INTERACTIVE)

startupAudit.rootCause1: MISSING app/index.tsx — Expo Router had no route for '/' (the root path). Without an index route, the router falls through to +not-found or renders nothing (black screen). This is the #1 root cause of the black screen on cold launch.
startupAudit.rootCause1Fix: Created app/index.tsx with a Redirect to /login when unauthenticated, Redirect to /(tabs)/(home)/home when authenticated, and a brief loading screen during auth bootstrap.
startupAudit.rootCause2: metro.config.js had a bare require("@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk/metro") with no try/catch. When the toolkit SDK does not export the /metro subpath, the bundler crashes at createBundleReleaseJsAndAssets, producing a bundle with no JS.
startupAudit.rootCause2Fix: Wrapped require in try/catch with fallback to default Expo Metro config. Build log confirms: '[IVX] Metro config: @rork-ai/toolkit-sdk/metro not available — using default Expo config'.
startupAudit.rootCause3: Hardcoded owner password 'X146corp@1x146corp$$1' in loginOwnerPasswordless fallback (auth-context.tsx line 1668) and SupabaseAuthDiagnostic.tsx line 62. This was automatic credential submission without user input.
startupAudit.rootCause3Fix: Removed hardcoded password fallback entirely from loginOwnerPasswordless — returns failure with clear message instead. Replaced SupabaseAuthDiagnostic signInWithPassword with getSession (config check only, no credential submission).
startupAudit.rootCause4: Startup trace was missing required checkpoints from the spec: ROOT_COMPONENT_MOUNTED, ERROR_BOUNDARY_MOUNTED, PROVIDERS_STARTED, PROVIDERS_COMPLETED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_STARTED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_COMPLETED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_FAILED, INITIAL_ROUTE_SELECTED, APP_INTERACTIVE.
startupAudit.rootCause4Fix: Expanded StartupCheckpoint type to include all required checkpoints. Added logging calls in app/_layout.tsx, app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx, app/login.tsx, app/index.tsx, and lib/auth-context.tsx.

expo/lib/auth-context.tsx (removed hardcoded password from loginOwnerPasswordless, added AUTH_INITIALIZATION_* checkpoints)

expo/lib/startup-trace.ts (expanded checkpoints: ROOT_COMPONENT_MOUNTED, ERROR_BOUNDARY_MOUNTED, PROVIDERS_STARTED, PROVIDERS_COMPLETED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_STARTED/COMPLETED/FAILED, INITIAL_ROUTE_SELECTED, APP_INTERACTIVE)
expo/app/_layout.tsx (added ROOT_COMPONENT_MOUNTED, ERROR_BOUNDARY_MOUNTED, PROVIDERS_STARTED, PROVIDERS_COMPLETED, APP_INTERACTIVE checkpoints)

Now: returns failure with 'Owner passwordless login is not available. Please use email and password sign-in.'
